source: Mendoza College of Business at Notre Dame

news.title: NDIGI Book Club builds better investors
news.summary_en: NDIGI's Book Club, open to students and alumni, deepens their understanding of the business world and fosters a mindset of continuous learning.

news.title: What CEOs get wrong on earnings calls
news.summary_en: New research from strategic leadership associate professor Mike Mannor reveals how markets respond when CEOs communicate new strategies.
